$comment: Index of the dots html component catalog. Each item is a self-describing HTML asset in this directory with a header comment (when to use, variants, gotchas). Visual fragments include scoped CSS and copy-paste markup; optional behavior uses a data-component script. All CSS consumes only theme.css tokens.
name: dots-html

items.name: page-shell
items.title: Page shell
items.when: Every page. Static document skeleton: header, status chip, dek, article column, and footer.

items.name: page-behavior
items.title: Page behavior
items.when: A page uses motion, one-time reveals, TOC scroll-spy, or a theme toggle. Optional; omit for static pages.

items.name: toc-rail
items.title: TOC rail
items.when: 4+ sections. Sticky margin rail; inline list on narrow viewports. page-behavior optionally adds scroll-spy.

items.name: callout
items.title: Callout
items.when: A fact the reader must not scroll past. Variants: note, warn, danger.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data table
items.when: Structured rows: decisions, inventories, risk registers. Horizontal dividers only.

items.name: bar-chart
items.title: Bar chart
items.when: Compare magnitudes across up to ~8 items. Horizontal bars, one emphasized; page-behavior optionally adds a one-time grow reveal.

items.name: sparkline
items.title: Sparkline
items.when: A trend inline with text or inside a stat tile; no axes, one emphasized endpoint.

items.name: recommendation
items.title: Recommendation
items.when: The document's committing conclusion. One per document, near the end.

items.name: code-panel
items.title: Code panel
items.when: Multi-line code or config. Dark surface in both modes, filename header, horizontal scroll contained.

items.name: diff-block
items.title: Diff block
items.when: Before/after code changes with added/removed line marking.

items.name: comparison-grid
items.title: Comparison grid
items.when: 2-4 options side by side with best-for annotations; the reader picks one.

items.name: disclosure
items.title: Disclosure
items.when: Progressive detail: sources, raw data, appendix material. Native details/summary.

items.name: timeline
items.title: Timeline
items.when: Milestones, phases, or incident chronology in order; order must carry real information.

items.name: flow-diagram
items.title: Flow diagram
items.when: A system or process with nodes and edges; inline SVG on tokens, with a text fallback.

items.name: pull-quote
items.title: Pull quote
items.when: One thesis line worth isolating per document. Typographic emphasis only — no accent bar.

items.name: theme-toggle
items.title: Theme toggle
items.when: Reader-facing light/dark switch; page-behavior wires it. Optional — prefers-color-scheme works without it.
